title: Peruvian Kidney Bean Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Peru, made with tender kidney beans and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the beef broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced aji amarillo peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the kidney beans, bean sprouts, and stew spices blend.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
